title: Treatise
description: A mod about documentation.  Powered by Lavender.
body:
![Treatise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe46d6d55b889064da2f37dd858a2d427dd7cf0.png)

## Description
*Treatise* serves as a base mod for Dented Modding's in-game documentation via a [Lavender](https://modrinth.com/mod/lavender) book.

### Features:
- Includes one craftable item, the Treatise
- Additional content is added to the Treatise as other Dented Modding mods are installed
- As of version 1.21.4-1.0.0, the Treatise will be given to the player upon first joining a world

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
